description: Age-related macular degeneration (AMD) common-risk-allele panel: CFH Y402H (rs1061170) and ARMS2/HTRA1 (rs10490924). These are common GWAS risk alleles, NOT ClinVar P/LP variants — findings carry clinvar_significance=NULL and capped evidence stars. Odds ratios are illustrative single-cohort estimates with wide CIs and are always paired with absolute-risk context. EXPANSION_STRATEGY.md §9 / roadmap #26.

genotype_models.odds_ratio: OR ~33.3 (95% CI 12.8–86.4) for advanced AMD vs the low-risk reference genotype — an illustrative single-cohort estimate (n=14) with a very wide confidence interval
genotype_models.absolute_risk_context: This is a relative odds ratio from one case-control cohort, not an absolute or lifetime risk. Absolute AMD risk depends strongly on age (AMD is age-related), smoking, and the other ~50 known AMD variants. These two loci do not by themselves determine whether AMD develops, and the odds ratios attenuate in East Asian populations.
genotype_models.finding_text: You carry the high-risk CFH + ARMS2 double-homozygous genotype ({genotype}). {odds_ratio}. {absolute_risk}

genotype_models.odds_ratio: OR ~7.2 (95% CI 3.6–14.5) for advanced AMD for the CFH Y402H CC homozygous genotype
genotype_models.absolute_risk_context: This is a relative odds ratio, not an absolute or lifetime risk. Absolute AMD risk also depends strongly on age, smoking, and the other ~50 known AMD variants; the odds ratios attenuate in East Asian populations.
genotype_models.finding_text: CFH Y402H homozygous (rs1061170 {genotype}) — both copies carry the AMD risk allele. {odds_ratio}. {absolute_risk}

genotype_models.odds_ratio: OR ~5.5 (95% CI 2.6–11.8) for advanced AMD for the ARMS2 TT homozygous genotype
genotype_models.absolute_risk_context: This is a relative odds ratio, not an absolute or lifetime risk. Absolute AMD risk also depends strongly on age, smoking, and the other ~50 known AMD variants; the odds ratios attenuate in East Asian populations.
genotype_models.finding_text: ARMS2/HTRA1 homozygous (rs10490924 {genotype}) — both copies carry the AMD risk allele. {odds_ratio}. {absolute_risk}

genotype_models.odds_ratio: Carrying one risk allele at both CFH Y402H and ARMS2 confers an intermediate, additively increased AMD risk, below either homozygous genotype
genotype_models.absolute_risk_context: This is a relative, intermediate risk, not an absolute or lifetime risk. Absolute AMD risk depends strongly on age, smoking, and the other ~50 known AMD variants; the odds ratios attenuate in East Asian populations.
genotype_models.finding_text: You carry one risk allele at both CFH Y402H and ARMS2 ({genotype}). {odds_ratio}. {absolute_risk}

genotype_models.odds_ratio: A single CFH Y402H risk allele confers a modestly increased AMD risk, well below the homozygous genotype
genotype_models.absolute_risk_context: This is a modest relative risk, not an absolute or lifetime risk. Absolute AMD risk depends strongly on age, smoking, and the other ~50 known AMD variants; the odds ratios attenuate in East Asian populations.
genotype_models.finding_text: CFH Y402H heterozygous (rs1061170 {genotype}) — you carry one copy. {odds_ratio}. {absolute_risk}

genotype_models.odds_ratio: A single ARMS2 risk allele confers a modestly increased AMD risk, well below the homozygous genotype
genotype_models.absolute_risk_context: This is a modest relative risk, not an absolute or lifetime risk. Absolute AMD risk depends strongly on age, smoking, and the other ~50 known AMD variants; the odds ratios attenuate in East Asian populations.
genotype_models.finding_text: ARMS2/HTRA1 heterozygous (rs10490924 {genotype}) — you carry one copy. {odds_ratio}. {absolute_risk}
